description: Style NoteEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. vishudh considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals.Product DetailsBlueish green floral printed woven kurta, has a split neckline, paneling and stitched detailing on the yoke, short sleeves with paneling on the cuffs and a vented hemMaterial and CareBlended cottonMachine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
